name: Thief Office Simulator
short_description: Simulation game where player mission is to steal as much money, jewelry etc in different places and avoid guardians and cameras
detailed_description:
Story:

Thief office simulator is first person simulation game where player mission is to steal money, jewelry, watches etc at 3 different locations: House, Office, Market. Every level there are guardians and cameras. If those detect player game is over. Also there are locked doors which need pincode. Pincode number series is hidden somewhere and player need find it to unlock door. Also try to find money, jewelry, those are hidden at different places and every level there are also safebox. You can open SafeBox with Sounds. You will hear click Sound When The number is correct. When you see camera or guardians you need hide, you can hide also some wardrobes

Every level there is also $ mark it tells level end and after you reach it it show how much you have stolen stuff. Also earn steam achievements by playing enough long levels.

Controls:

Tab= Bag show to how much steal

E = Interact with doors, safebox etc

Left mouse button = Pin code

Left shift = Sprint

Features:

- 3 different locations to steal items

  • Camera Security System

    •  Steam achievements: Play enough to earn steam achievements

    • guardians. 

    • End place where you get how much items stolen

    • Doors with pincode

    • Safety box to hack
